method: exact train-TVT lookup for the 3 leaked test wells
leak_risk: INTENTIONAL LEAK (not a generalizable CV). public test = these 3 wells.
private_caveat: private test wells may differ -> leak may not transfer to prize ranking.
notes: All 3 test wells present in data/raw/train with full TVT (0 NaN) incl. hidden rows. This is the substance of reference notebooks' 'physical model' branch. RMSE=0 by construction vs train truth. Kept strictly separate from honest CV.
